basic_details.job_title: BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 16 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) has released the official Apprentice Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 01/2026. A total of 16 vacancies have been announced under the BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have passed 10th Class with a minimum of 40% marks along with an ITI/NCVT/SCVT certificate for ITI trades, or 8th Class for Non-ITI trades such as Gardner and Cook, are eligible to apply online. Interested candidates can submit their applications on or before 04 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th class with minimum 40% marks and ITI/NCVT/SCVT certificate for ITI trades, 8th class for Non-ITI trades (Gardner, Cook)
qualification.details: Lineman: 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Lineman trade from NCVT/SCVT. Electrician: 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Electrician trade from NCVT/SCVT. Gardner: 8th class from recognised school or equivalent. Cook: 8th class from recognised school or equivalent. Welder: 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Welder trade from NCVT/SCVT. Plumber: 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Plumber trade from NCVT/SCVT.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary/stipend details.

selection_process: Merit List from NAPS portal based on 10th and ITI marks Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BBMB Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BBMB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the BBMB Apprentice recruitment is 04 July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by BBMB?
faq.answer: Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) has announced a total of 16 vacancies for the Apprentice posts in its recent recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the BBMB Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: For ITI trades, candidates need to have passed the 10th class with a minimum of 40% marks and possess an ITI/NCVT/SCVT certificate. For Non-ITI trades like Gardner and Cook, an 8th class pass is required.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the BBMB Apprentice recruitment 2026. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the BBMB Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for BBMB Apprentice posts involves the creation of a merit list based on the marks obtained in the 10th class and ITI from the NAPS portal, followed by a document verification stage.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the BBMB Apprentice recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official BBMB website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the BBMB Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The Apprentice posts offered by Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) are contractual in nature, providing an opportunity for candidates to gain experience.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the BBMB located?
faq.answer: The Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) has its operations and recruitment activities often associated with Punjab, with Jalandhar being a relevant city in this context.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of Apprentice posts by the Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) is 01/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, applications for the BBMB Apprentice recruitment must be submitted online only. Offline applications will not be accepted. Ensure you complete the process via the official portal.
